Registers
=========

Auto-generated register map imported from ``registers/generated/counter_regs.html``.

.. raw:: html

   <div style="
       width: 100%;
       height: 80vh;
       min-height: 600px;
       border: 1px solid #e1e4e5;
       border-radius: 4px;
       overflow: hidden;
   ">
     <iframe
       src="_static/registers.html"
       style="width:100%; height:100%; border:none;"
       title="Register Map">
     </iframe>
   </div>

.. note::

   This page embeds the register map generated at ``registers/generated/counter_regs.html``.
   Re-run ``make html`` after regenerating the register map to update it.
